turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Uh yeah hi. I need to see someone for — this is a bit embarrassing — I need to see a gastroenterologist. I've been having stomach issues for a month.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Please don't worry, these are very common concerns. Dr. Farhan Qureshi is our gastroenterologist and he's highly experienced. He's free this Thursday at 6 PM or Saturday at 11 AM.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Saturday at 11 AM it is. Your name and number please?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Confirmed! Mr. Bansal, your appointment is set for Saturday at 11 AM with Dr. Qureshi. If you have any prior reports or endoscopy results, please bring them along.
